title: loan debt totem
description: changes the immortality totem to a debt document
body:
![loan debt totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db9915cfaaa7bbca8e46989ab8170fde21b2f830.png)
**This resource pack changes the totem of undying to a debt document, as well as changing its particles and replacing the sound.**
## 

**what exactly is it changing**
- will change the textures of the totem
- changes the totem particles
- changes the sounds of the totem


  **Important note**

**the totem's sound is the Russian phrase "when you return the debt," and the totem's texture also contains the word "debt" in Russian**
